title: Fix command failure not resulting in task failure
body:
For whatever reason (I don't understand this stuff well) the
`win-podman-machine-main.ps1` script exits successfully despite the
final `Check-Exit` showing a non-zero exit code was detected.  Attempt
to fix this by throwing an exception instead of calling `Exit`.

Ref: https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/20852#issuecomment-1834453550

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

<!--
If no, just write `None` in the release-note block below. If yes, a release note

string "action required".

For more information on release notes, please follow the Kubernetes model:
https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/release-notes.md
-->

```release-note
None
```

comments.body: Cockpit tests failed for commit 51f073d46cc36696f02de3fe1f8380fc7933c48f. @martinpitt, @jelly, @mvollmer please check.
The cockpit test failure detected a crun regression in podman-next, see https://github.com/containers/crun/issues/1367 Unrelated to this PR.

Force-push: rebased after https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/20852 merged.

@mheon PTAL this should be ready to go (assuming CI passes - but windows fails)

LGTM
